name: Portable Waterproof Outdoor Speaker
description: Rugged IPX7 waterproof mini speaker with punchy bass, 12-hour playtime, and a built-in lanyard for hiking.

name: Smart Home Wireless Speaker Hub
description: Premium 360-degree room-filling acoustic audio system with voice control assistants and dynamic ambient LED lighting circles.

name: Heavy Bass Dual Subwoofer Speaker
description: High-fidelity party speaker pairing deep sub-bass drivers, dual tweeters, TWS stereo syncing, and a power bank option.

name: Pro Studio Over-Ear Headphones
description: Professional acoustic monitor headphones featuring premium leather earcups, 40mm drivers, and detachable coiled cable.

name: Active Sport Wireless Earbuds
description: Ergonomic sweatproof secure-fit ear hooks with touch controls, ambient sound awareness settings, and a fast-charging case.

name: Wireless Pro Gaming Controller
description: High-performance wireless gamepad with ultra-low latency, tactile responsive switches, and ergonomic grip texturing.

name: Mechanical Tenkeyless Gaming Keyboard
description: Compact layout mechanical keyboard equipped with hot-swappable linear switches, sound dampening foam, and clean ice-blue backlighting.

name: Mirrorless Full-Frame Camera Body
description: High-resolution mirrorless camera featuring a advanced full-frame sensor, ultra-fast autofocus, and 4K uncropped video tracking.

name: 50mm f/1.4 Prime Portrait Lens
description: Ultra-bright standard focal length lens delivering exceptional low-light performance and beautiful background bokeh separation.

name: 3-Axis Motorized Gimbal Stabilizer
description: Handheld cinema stabilizer for smooth handheld panning shots, featuring auto-tuning algorithms and tracking controls.

name: Professional Carbon Fiber Tripod
description: Ultra-lightweight yet rigid support frame system equipped with a heavy-duty ball head and variable height micro-adjustments.

name: Ultra-Slim 14-Inch Productivity Laptop
description: Lightweight metallic laptop equipped with an advanced processor, vibrant display, and 14-hour battery life for modern professionals.

name: Pro 11-Inch Digital Drawing Tablet
description: High-resolution touch tablet featuring an ultra-responsive pressure pen, crisp display matrix, and split-screen multitasking capabilities.

name: 27-Inch Minimalist Desktop All-In-One
description: Space-saving desktop workstation combining processing power directly inside a thin, modern display housing with wireless accessories.

name: Convertible 2-in-1 Touchscreen Laptop
description: Versatile laptop featuring a robust 360-degree flip hinge system that transforms it instantly into an ergonomic tablet view.

name: Ergonomic Sports Water Bottle
description: BPA-free vacuum insulated stainless steel flask with a leak-proof straw lid, keeping drinks ice-cold during workouts.

name: High-Density Non-Slip Yoga Mat
description: Eco-friendly extra thick fitness exercise mat providing comfortable cushioning and joint alignment tracks for intense floor routines.

name: Adjustable Speed Jump Rope
description: Tangle-free skipping rope fitted with ball bearings and memory foam anti-slip handles for agility cardio conditioning.

name: Minimalist Matte White Smartphone Case
description: Ultra-thin, shock-absorbent protective casing with precise button cutouts and a smooth anti-fingerprint matte exterior finish.

name: Fast Charging Magnetic Wireless Pad
description: Premium 15W induction wireless charger matrix engineered with alignment magnets for safe, thermal-regulated power distribution.

name: Aluminum Desktop Phone Stand Cradle
description: Ergonomic multi-angle adjustable desktop holding station crafted with weighted stability bases and non-slip silicone protective pads.

name: Braided Nylon High-Speed Type-C Cable
description: Heavy-duty 6ft reinforced charging and high-velocity data transmission sync cord with protective stress-relief strain collars.
